name: player_snaps
expected_query: with "tbf0efce2c321a391b20b8e3c21cad25a" as (select "nfl_snaps"."gsis_it_id", COUNT(*) as rate_type_total_count from "nfl_plays" inner join "nfl_snaps" on "nfl_plays"."esbid" = "nfl_snaps"."esbid" and "nfl_plays"."playId" = "nfl_snaps"."playId" where not "play_type" = 'NOPL' and "play_type" in ('PASS', 'RUSH') group by "nfl_snaps"."gsis_it_id") select "player"."pid", tbf0efce2c321a391b20b8e3c21cad25a.rate_type_total_count as player_snaps_0, "player"."pos" from "player" left join "tbf0efce2c321a391b20b8e3c21cad25a" on "tbf0efce2c321a391b20b8e3c21cad25a"."gsis_it_id" = "player"."gsis_it_id" group by tbf0efce2c321a391b20b8e3c21cad25a.rate_type_total_count, "player"."pid", "player"."lname", "player"."fname", "player"."pos" order by 2 DESC NULLS LAST, "player"."pid" asc limit 500
